items.caption: A stylized graphic of a hookah with a pattern in the hand and smoke, set against a black background. the hookah is depicted in a yellow outline with a black background, and the smoke is represented by a wavy line. the hand holding the hookah has a pattern on the palm, and the hookah itself has a design on the bowl. the word "hookah" is written in a flowing cursive script above the hookah, with the smoke curling around it.
